risk_reason: New package (engine/wal) with no prior LLD implementation; this subtask establishes the on-disk record format (length+CRC header) and segment-naming/rotation convention that subtasks 1.3.2-1.3.5 will all depend on. Getting the framing/rotation boundary wrong here would require a breaking format change later.

downstream_dependents.reason: record types + fsync-before-apply write path build directly on Writer.Append
checkpoint manifest tracks WAL offsets into segments produced by this writer
recovery replay reads segment files produced by this writer
crash-injection recovery test corrupts/truncates segment files produced by this writer

public_api_surface: func OpenWriter(dir string, maxSegmentBytes int64) (*Writer, error)
backward_compatibility: N/A — brand new package, no existing callers.

new_tests: TestSegmentWriter (rotation + record integrity per issue test spec)
additional focused unit tests for header round-trip, oversized-record hard error, resume/reopen segment numbering
